samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer with data synchronization and enable control.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Clock signal A used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Clock signal B used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Active-low reset signal A. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Active-low reset signal B. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data signal of size 4 bits.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input enable signal that controls the selection operation.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data signal of size 4 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="RESET_A" value="0">Reset state for clock A.</state>
        <state name="SYNC_A" value="1">Synchronization state for clock A.</state>
        <state name="RESET_B" value="0">Reset state for clock B.</state>
        <state name="SYNC_B" value="1">Synchronization state for clock B.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="data_reg" width="4" reset_value="0" update_on_posedge_clk="clk_a" update_on_negedge_reset="arstn" description="Register to store input data signal."/>
        <register id="en_data_reg" width="1" reset_value="0" update_on_posedge_clk="clk_a" update_on_negedge_reset="arstn" description="Register to store input enable signal."/>
        <register id="en_clap_one" width="1" reset_value="0" update_on_posedge_clk="clk_b" update_on_negedge_reset="brstn" description="First enable control register."/>
        <register id="en_clap_two" width="1" reset_value="0" update_on_posedge_clk="clk_b" update_on_negedge_reset="brstn" description="Second enable control register."/>
        <wire id="dataout" width="4" description="Output data signal."/>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Data Register
        always @(posedge clk_a or negedge arstn) begin
            if (!arstn) begin
                data_reg <= 4'b0;
            end else begin
                data_reg <= data_in;
            end
        end
        
        // Enable Data Register
        always @(posedge clk_a or negedge arstn) begin
            if (!arstn) begin
                en_data_reg <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                en_data_reg <= data_en;
            end
        end
        
        // Enable Control Registers
        always @(posedge clk_b or negedge brstn) begin
            if (!brstn) begin
                en_clap_one <= 1'b0;
                en_clap_two <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                en_clap_one <= en_data_reg;
                en_clap_two <= en_clap_one;
            end
        end
        
        // Output Assignment
        always @(posedge clk_b or negedge brstn) begin
            if (!brstn) begin
                dataout <= 4'b0;
            end else begin
                if (en_clap_two) begin
                    dataout <= data_reg;
                end else begin
                    dataout <= dataout; // Retain previous value
                end
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
```
